name: Incandescent 2
short_description: Incandescent 2 is a retro inspired fast paced twin stick shooter that will challenge you the longer you play. Pilot your ship and defeat the many waves of enemies in your way. Challenge your friends to beat your score in the Steam Leaderboards!
detailed_description:
Incandescent 2 is a retro inspired fast paced twin stick shooter that will challenge you the longer you play. Pilot your ship and defeat the many waves of enemies in your way. Challenge your friends to beat your score in the Steam Leaderboards!

Features:
- Fast paced arcade action in many bright colours.
- You can use a controller or mouse and keyboard.
- Supports 720p, 1080p and 1440p.
- Steam Leaderboards, to find out who is the best.

All the colourful enemies are back and they need to be destroyed!
